title: While everyone got f*ked 3 days ago, i got saved
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/90h1hedp2vuf1.png?width=592&format=png&auto=webp&s=11e9a540f4153db3c8df8766665e15b62a34bb1b

Not saying that anyone should switch up their strat, but honestly using ai in  2025 is a must imo,to me i use it as a extra indicator to confirm my original trading setup.

In this case it litterly saved my ass, initially i had a target set at $130k.. After this analyze i moved the stop loss to breakeven in case i were wrong. And little did i know, the target was hit and 130k was never touched.

I was lucky, not saying this is saving me everytime, but having it as a confirimation to my original idea have been extremly helpful.

https://preview.redd.it/qgraitiq3vuf1.png?width=320&format=png&auto=webp&s=bdf013d7fe4dd41d2f213744fa25d9bca23763a5

[Here](http://Tickrad.com)

comments.author: 8-Bit_Soul
comments.body: It looks like instead of entering a ticker symbol, you are supposed to take a screenshot of a chart and upload the image. Is that correct?

comments.author: missedalmostallofit
comments.body: This Ai made me sell AMD two weeks ago. Be careful!
